## Meeting Purpose

[Explore GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services for Get Parallel's inbound marketing needs.](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Get Parallel lacks inbound marketing strategy; currently relies on outbound and referrals](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-enhanced content creation, focusing on long-form editorial content first](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Two-phase approach: Strategy Sprint ($20-30K) followed by ongoing execution ($9-25K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [GrowthX's process involves deep brand understanding, AI workflows, and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)

## Topics

### Get Parallel's Current Marketing Situation

  - [No in-house marketer; relies on outbound and referrals for leads](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Experimenting with Reddit for alternative mentions (5 calls/week)](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Seeking to build inbound marketing function from scratch](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [Considering various content types: social media, SEO, case studies](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Services

  - [Focus on editorial content (blogs, long-form) as foundation](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [Use AI workflows for research, drafting, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [Human expertise (editors, strategists) for quality control and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [Two-phase engagement: Strategy Sprint + Ongoing Execution](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Strategy Sprint: Deep dive into brand, personas, tone, roadmap ($20-30K)](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [Execution: Daily publishing, customizable workflows ($9-25K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=1947.0)

### Content Strategy and AI Integration

  - [Emphasis on answering key customer questions across channels](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Consideration for both SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [AI used for research, initial drafts, and workflow optimization](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [Human experts refine and ensure quality of AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)

### Pricing and Deliverables

  - [Strategy Sprint: $20-30K (likely $20K for Get Parallel)](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
  - [Ongoing Execution: $9-25K/month (estimated $9-12K for Get Parallel)](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=1947.0)
  - [Typical output: \~5 articles/week, with potential for additional content types](https://fathom.video/share/jfQX_xnNcC_x-gVZ1LEiSQy1hp2xo3KS?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
